demographics.living_situation: lives at home with her partner, who is present

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have this sharp pain in my ribs when I take a deep breath, and I noticed this weird purple lacy rash on my legs again.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The chest pain came on suddenly a few hours ago and it hurts every time I breathe in deeply. I'm a bit worried because I've had a blood clot before.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 4 hours ago, came on suddenly
symptom_narrative.duration: ongoing for the last few hours
symptom_narrative.character: sharp, catching pain in the right side of my ribs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: bad enough that I'm breathing shallowly to avoid setting it off
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right side of my chest / ribs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, but much worse each time I breathe in deeply
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel a bit short of breath too, and my heart feels like it's going fast. No cough and no fever.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had this chest pain before, but I did have a blood clot in my left leg three years ago that came out of nowhere.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm resting because moving or breathing deeply makes the pain worse.

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a blood clot in my left leg about three years ago, and it happened for no obvious reason
past_medical_history.how_managed: I was treated at the time but I'm not on any blood thinners now

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: two early miscarriages in the first trimester that were never really explained

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home with my partner tonight; I'm anxious because of my past blood clot

objective_data_offered.value: a purple, lacy, net-like rash on both my thighs and forearms that doesn't fade when I press on it — it has come back again
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described and shown by the patient over video; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: my partner says I'm breathing shallowly and wincing whenever I try to take a deep breath
my heart feels like it's racing
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective sensation; no home heart-rate device used
